properties.displayName: Privileged Role Assigned to New Account (< 7 Days Old)
properties.description: Detects when a Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, or other high-privilege role is assigned to an account that was created fewer than 7 days ago. This is a critical indicator of potential account compromise or insider threat. MITRE ATT&CK: T1136 - Create Account, T1098 - Account Manipulation.
properties.query:
let privilegedRoles = dynamic([
    "Global Administrator",
    "Privileged Role Administrator",
    "Security Administrator",
    "Exchange Administrator",
    "SharePoint Administrator",
    "User Access Administrator",
    "Helpdesk Administrator",
    "Compliance Administrator",
    "Application Administrator",
    "Cloud Application Administrator"
]);
let lookback = 7d;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role", "Add eligible member to role")
| where Result == "success"
| extend
    AssignedRole       = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
    TargetUPN          = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
    TargetId           = tostring(TargetResources[0].id),
    AssignedByUPN      = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
    AssignedByApp      = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| where AssignedRole in (privilegedRoles)
| join kind=inner (
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback + 1h)
    | where OperationName == "Add user"
    | extend
        NewUserUPN      = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
        NewUserId       = tostring(TargetResources[0].id),
        AccountCreated  = TimeGenerated
    | project NewUserUPN, NewUserId, AccountCreated
) on $left.TargetUPN == $right.NewUserUPN
| extend
    AccountAgeDays = datetime_diff('day', TimeGenerated, AccountCreated),
    AccountAgeHours = datetime_diff('hour', TimeGenerated, AccountCreated)
| where AccountAgeDays < 7
| extend
    RiskJustification = strcat(
        "Account created ", tostring(AccountAgeDays), " day(s) ago. ",
        "Role '", AssignedRole, "' assigned by ", AssignedByUPN
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    TargetUPN,
    AssignedRole,
    AssignedByUPN,
    AssignedByApp,
    AccountCreated,
    AccountAgeDays,
    AccountAgeHours,
    RiskJustification
